import torch
import torch.nn as nn


class DKTModel(nn.Module):
    def __init__(
        self,
        num_skills: int,
        emb_dim: int = 128,
        hidden_dim: int = 320,
        num_layers: int = 2,
        dropout: float = 0.2,
        use_attention: bool = False,
        attn_heads: int = 4,
        attn_layers: int = 1,
    ):
        super().__init__()
        self.num_skills = num_skills
        self.skill_emb = nn.Embedding(num_skills, emb_dim)
        self.resp_emb = nn.Embedding(2, emb_dim)
        self.interaction_emb = nn.Embedding(num_skills * 2, emb_dim)
        self.in_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(emb_dim * 3, hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(hidden_dim),
            nn.ReLU(),
            nn.Dropout(dropout),
        )
        gru_dropout = dropout if num_layers > 1 else 0.0
        self.rnn = nn.GRU(
            input_size=hidden_dim,
            hidden_size=hidden_dim,
            num_layers=num_layers,
            batch_first=True,
            dropout=gru_dropout,
        )
        self.dropout = nn.Dropout(dropout)
        self.out = nn.Linear(hidden_dim, num_skills)

    def encode_inputs(self, skill_ids: torch.Tensor, corrects: torch.Tensor):
        inter_ids = skill_ids + corrects.long() * self.num_skills
        x = torch.cat([
            self.skill_emb(skill_ids),
            self.resp_emb(corrects.long()),
            self.interaction_emb(inter_ids),
        ], dim=-1)
        return self.in_proj(x)

    def forward(self, skill_ids: torch.Tensor, corrects: torch.Tensor, lengths: torch.Tensor):
        x = self.encode_inputs(skill_ids, corrects)
        packed = nn.utils.rnn.pack_padded_sequence(
            x, lengths.cpu(), batch_first=True, enforce_sorted=False
        )
        packed_out, _ = self.rnn(packed)
        out, _ = nn.utils.rnn.pad_packed_sequence(
            packed_out, batch_first=True, total_length=skill_ids.size(1)
        )
        out = self.dropout(out)
        return self.out(out)

    def predict_next(self, skill_ids: torch.Tensor, corrects: torch.Tensor, lengths: torch.Tensor):
        logits_all = self.forward(skill_ids, corrects, lengths)
        next_skills = skill_ids[:, 1:]
        logits = logits_all[:, :-1, :].gather(-1, next_skills.unsqueeze(-1)).squeeze(-1)
        return logits
